title: FS-012 Agony Lesbian Battle 002 Kyoko Maki vs Marin Asakura - Maki Kyoko
description: Kyoko Maki, a lesbian queen, has a lesbian showdown with Marin Asakura. It was thought that Asakura would be blamed by Maki without anything to do, but he blamed Maki back. Both of them attack each other with expressions of ecstasy. Continue to blame until one of them faints. Both of them put their pride on each other and attack each other. Finally, she faints.
